title: TV Aerial Cable 2m - Male To Male Gold Plated Coaxial Wire with Plug to Plug Shielded Connectors | Antenna AV Lead for Digital and Analogue Signals - Black
features: QUALITY SIGNAL TRANSMISSION using CABLE MOUNTAIN- High Clarity Gold Plated male to male tv aerial cable with pure copper pins to maintain quality signal transfer. This tv ariels indoor cable / outdoor cabe is protected by a PVC protective jacket providing a robust design that will last.

COMPATIBLITY- This aerial lead for tv is ideal for connection to wall auxiliary socket, FreeView, Sky Q, YouView, Virgin and other cable/satellite tv boxes. This aerial lead for tv is the best choice to connecting your external aerial to your tv.

HIGH SPEED WITH NO INTERFERENCE- Rust resistant tv aerial extension cable offers clear transmission of high speed Digital and Analogue signals. Protected with PVC shielding minimizing the interference and signals so not affected by any other passing wire.
DURABLE AND LONG LASTING- Tv cable is durable, flexible and long lasting manufactured using quality materials. It provides first-rate Digital reception.

BUY WITH CONFIDENCE- Proudly designed in the UK by Smithonix, we stand by our products with a 12-month warranty. If you’re not satisfied with our tv antenna cable, contact us for a replacement or refund.
description: From the manufacturer Cable Mountain 2m Gold Plated Male to Male Plug to Plug Shielded TV Coaxial Aerial Cable Gold plated connectors Shielded cabling Commonly used to connect A/V equipment to aerial source or each other Two Male ends (Plug to Plug) Suitable for analogue or digital signals
